steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The notes highlight a specific numerical difference: the fennec fox has 64 chromosomes while the red fox has 34. The answer must use both numbers to compare the two species.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: omits the chromosome numbers entirely. ✗
  • Choice B: names both fox species and contrasts 64 versus 34 chromosomes directly. ✓
  • Choice C: describes only one fox or fails to make the comparison. ✗
  • Choice D: buries or omits the key numerical contrast. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
